title: Collapse Analysis (Distribution Shift)
purpose: Test whether the C-4 utility gain on LC322 survives distribution shift via four pre-declared population perturbations.
extends_c4_constraint: no_post_hoc_adjustment_of_decision_rule (extended to C-5: C_genuine decision rule not adjusted during C-5 analysis)

P1_accept_reject_ratio_shift.description: Re-label LC322 from 11 ACCEPT / 19 REJECT to 19 ACCEPT / 11 REJECT. The 11 solvers formerly labeled ACCEPT are relabeled REJECT; the 19 formerly labeled REJECT are relabeled ACCEPT.

P2a_solver_subsample_first_20.description: First 20 solvers of LC322 (indices 0..19 in sorted order).

P2b_solver_subsample_last_20.description: Last 20 solvers of LC322 (indices 10..29 in sorted order).

P3a_probe_family_knockout_reachability.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'reachability_counterfactual'.

P3b_probe_family_knockout_coin_order.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'non_canonical_coin_order'.

P3c_probe_family_knockout_large_amount.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'large_amount_stress'.

P3d_probe_family_knockout_greedy_dp.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'greedy_dp_threshold'.

P3e_probe_family_knockout_forward_dp.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'forward_dp_overwrite'.

P3f_probe_family_knockout_memo_cache.description: Remove all observed probes from family 'memo_cache_aliasing'.

P4_lc45_cross_population.description: LC45 result from C-4. No new execution needed.

falsification_criterion.SURVIVES: gap > 0.10 on all perturbations at all 9 lambda values
falsification_criterion.PARTIALLY_SURVIVES: gap maintained on some perturbations, collapses on others

aggregate_consistency_check.check: Re-run B1 on unperturbed LC322; recomputed (WA, WR) must equal stored (WA, WR) in data/midweather_fingerprint_lc322.json
aggregate_consistency_check.on_failure: STOP IMMEDIATELY. Do not record any result. Surface discrepancy to Foued.
